examples: When Ted was six we decided that he needed to know how to fasten and unfasten his seat belt.
Please unfasten your safety belt now.
May I unfasten my seatbelt, now?
She even taught us to unfasten the T-tops and slide each one into car's hatchback trunk, while we wait in the carpool lane at school.
Our only concern is whether the screws will easily unfasten over time, but the company let us know it's paying attention to this for the final product.
